title: July 4
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 4''' is the 185th day of the year (186th in leap years), with 180 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1970]] – [[Lewis MacLeod]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Kate Dickie]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Rohan Nichol]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Kevin Thoms]] is born.
*1979 – [[Star Wars Weekly 71|''Star Wars Weekly'' 71]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 55|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 55]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' paperback published.
*[[2017]] – "[[BB-8 Bandits]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 50|''Star Wars'' (2015) 50]] published.
*2018 – [[The Last Jedi Adaptation 4|''The Last Jedi Adaptation'' 4]] published.
*[[2023]] – [[Star Wars: Hidden Empire (TPB)|''Star Wars: Hidden Empire'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Rise and Fall of the Galactic Empire]]'' published in the UK.
<noinclude>
